title: Sustainability Dashboard Design
description: Design an intuitive dashboard for tracking carbon footprint metrics for small businesses.
problem_statement: Small businesses lack simple tools to monitor and reduce their environmental impact. Design a dashboard that makes sustainability data actionable.

title: Patient Data Analysis
description: Analyze anonymized patient data to identify patterns in treatment outcomes across demographics.
problem_statement: Healthcare providers need better insights into treatment efficacy across different patient groups. Analyze the dataset and present actionable findings.

title: Landing Page Optimization
description: Redesign and optimize a SaaS landing page to improve conversion rates using A/B testing principles.
problem_statement: Our current landing page has a 2% conversion rate. We need data-driven redesign proposals to improve this to 5%+.
